heading: Pecuniary penalty for nonpayment of installments of construction charges
label: 478 Pecuniary penalty for nonpayment of installments of construction charges
text: If any water-right applicant or entryman shall have, prior to , failed to pay any installment of his construction charges when due, there shall be added to the amount unpaid a penalty of 1 per centum thereof, and there shall be added a like penalty of 1 per centum of the amount unpaid on the first day of each month thereafter so long as such default shall have continued: , That the penalty of 1 per centum per month against delinquent accounts, is reduced to one-half of 1 per centum per month, as to all installments which may become due after .December 5, 1924December 5, 1924Provided
notes: CodificationSection consolidates first sentence of act , § 3, with act , § 4, subsec. H.Aug. 13, 1914Dec. 5, 1924
